flow.title: Deposit underlying
flow.subtitle: Capital inflow
flow.description: You send the underlying asset (e.g. USD, ETH) via the Gateway. Funds are received and accounted before any allocation.

flow.title: Receive yoToken
flow.subtitle: Vault shares
flow.description: You receive vault shares (yoUSD, yoETH, etc.) representing your share of the vault. Your token balance does not rebase.

flow.title: Vault allocates into strategies
flow.subtitle: Asset allocation
flow.description: The vault routes capital into whitelisted strategies according to configured weights and caps. Each strategy deploys to external yield sources (lending, LP, etc.).

flow.title: Yield increases exchange rate
flow.subtitle: Value accrual
flow.description: As strategies earn yield, the vault’s total underlying value grows. The share price (exchange rate) goes up, so each yoToken is worth more underlying over time.

flow.title: Redeem later for more underlying
flow.subtitle: Exit
flow.description: When you redeem, you burn yoTokens and receive underlying. Because the exchange rate has grown, you get back more than you deposited (minus fees and any losses).

exchangeRateNote: Exchange rate = total underlying value ÷ total supply of yoTokens. Yield shows up in the rate, not in token quantity. Your balance stays constant; your claim on underlying grows.
